positive: A detailed, symmetrical composition featuring bioluminescent floral structures intertwined with delicate cosmic nebulae. The main subject is a stylized, ethereal celestial lotus blooming around a central void, rendered in a symmetrical mandala style. Use a deep indigo and vibrant teal color palette, contrasted sharply by glowing gold and pale lavender highlights. The style should be a fusion of detailed Art Nouveau illustration and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print textures. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast for optimal apparel printing. The lighting should be dramatic and backlit, giving a glowing, magical feel, with perfect central focus and negative space balanced around the edges.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, deformed, extra limbs, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, noisy, low detail, out of focus, abstract noise, grayscale, monochrome
